default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Troubleshoot Atlas-to-Framer article publishing failures.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Fix:** Publishing requires the Framer MCP plugin to be active and its unique URL pasted into Atlas. This enables the necessary local connection.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** A recent Framer site relaunch renamed the target collection from "Blog" to "Blog 📝," breaking the hard-coded Atlas workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [**Known Issue:** Atlas will still report a "failed" status, but this is a false negative; articles publish successfully as drafts in Framer.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [**Relay Project:** A content-only scope (Contentful) is viable. Key risks to clarify are content volume and the client's expectations for interactive elements (e.g., quizzes).](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)

## Topics

### Framer Publishing Failures

  - [**Problem:** Atlas publishing jobs were running indefinitely and failing to create articles in Framer.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [**Root Cause 1: MCP Plugin**](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
      - [The Framer MCP plugin must be active to create a local connection that Atlas requires.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
      - [Each user's plugin generates a unique URL that must be pasted into the `Framer MCP URL` field in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [**Root Cause 2: Collection Name Mismatch**](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
      - [A recent Framer site relaunch renamed the target collection, breaking the hard-coded Atlas workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
      - [**Old Name:** `Blog`](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [**New Name:** `Blog 📝`](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [**Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
      - [Update the Atlas workflow's collection name to `Blog 📝`.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
      - [Ensure the MCP plugin is active and the correct URL is in Atlas before publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [**Result:** The test article published successfully as a draft in Framer.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)

### Relay Project Scoping

  - [**Context:** Relay is considering a content-only project for micro-sites, with another vendor handling development.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [**Technical Viability:** High, as the project uses Contentful, a familiar CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [**Key Risks to Clarify:**](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
      - [**Content Volume:** Confirm it aligns with current capacity.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
      - [**Interactive Elements:** Clarify if the client expects us to build interactive features (e.g., quizzes) or just provide static content for templates built by the dev vendor.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kirkland:**](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
      - [Set Rachel's MCP URL as the default in the Atlas workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
      - [Update the workflow's default collection name to `Blog 📝`.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [**Rachel:**](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
      - [Use the new publishing process (active MCP plugin + correct URL) for all articles.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)
      - [Clarify with the client:](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)
          - [Expectations for interactive elements on micro-sites.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
          - [Default author and single-select category requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/aG5_3i_KsM1MUzFEEoAw-Ysj-LADp3rn?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)

action_items.description: Update Atlas default Framer MCP URL to Rachel's
Follow up w/ Hyperexponential re: images + author handling; then update Atlas defaults
Confirm w/ Rachel: Framer category is single-select
Email Relay: confirm CMS, content volume, and dynamic elements (e.g., quizzes)
